title: A Gift for the Editor
article_text: An editor normally works at a desk, but today he is climbing a mountain. He wants to generate a new gift for his guest. The guest will mainly see the beautiful sight from the top. Moreover, the editor must not deny himself this chance. He has a gun in his bag for safety, but he hopes he will not use it. The delivery of a quote from the minister will happen later. Basically, anybody can climb this mountain if they have the right manner. The noise from the wind is loud in his mouth and ears. He does not oppose the climb because it is a historical branch of his life. The violence in his past is now behind him, and he should focus on the present.

sentences.en: An editor normally works at a desk, but today he is climbing a mountain.
sentences.zh: 一位编辑通常坐在桌前工作，但今天他在爬山。

sentences.zh: 客人将主要从山顶看到美丽的景色。

sentences.zh: 而且，编辑不能拒绝自己这个机会。

sentences.zh: 他包里有一把枪以防万一，但他希望不会用到它。

sentences.en: The delivery of a quote from the minister will happen later.
sentences.zh: 部长的一句引文稍后会送达。

sentences.en: Basically, anybody can climb this mountain if they have the right manner.
sentences.zh: 基本上，任何人都能爬这座山，只要他们态度正确。

sentences.zh: 风的噪音在他嘴里和耳朵里很响。
